package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_finalizer_used_for_regular_cleanup: Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag runtime.SetFinalizer use for ordinary resource cleanup instead of explicit Close ownership.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule539PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario539Positive(records []Rule539PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
